title: Add PixelDream to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [PixelDream](https://upixeldream.netlify.app/) to image
- Turn any idea into an image. Free to use.

Fixes #10213

gist.headline: Dreaming in pixels
gist.blurb: PixelDream just landed in the community greenhouse. It turns ideas into images, costs nothing, and looks great doing it.
gist.summary: Added the community-built PixelDream app to the pollinations.ai showcase and greenhouse directories.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use PixelDream to generate images directly from the community apps list.
gist.visual_concept: The app is called 'PixelDream' and focuses on image generation. The visual should represent dreaming and pixels. Polly the bee sleeping on a fluffy cloud with a thought bubble showing a generated landscape, while the Nomnom creature snacks on floating sleep symbols.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny nightcap, sleeping peacefully on a fluffy cloud with a thought bubble showing a beautiful pixelated landscape. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby happily eating floating 'Zzz' letters. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny nightcap, sleeping peacefully on a fluffy cloud with a thought bubble showing a beautiful pixelated landscape. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby happily eating floating 'Zzz' letters. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
